title: micranthes napensis
intro: Micranthes nardus, also known as Alpine Wintergreen, is a species of flowering plant in the saxifrage family. This plant is rich in methyl salicylate, a compound that has been used to create a topical analgesic, similar to aspirin. The medicinal properties of Alpine Wintergreen include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as arthritis and muscle soreness. Alpine Wintergreen is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and salves, to provide relief from muscle and joint pain.
